hypotheses.hypothesis: Adding structured sections (Analysis approach, Hypothesis patterns, Common pitfalls, Target/Protected file patterns) to the custom strategy in domain-strategies.md will fix strategy-completeness and strategy-depth evals
Adding test cases for code-quality and feature-completion strategies to evals.json will bring domain coverage from 3/6 to 5/6, passing the eval-domain-coverage eval

Adding concrete glob patterns (e.g. **/*.ts, **/*.py) to Target/Protected file patterns in performance-optimization, test-hardening, code-quality, and feature-completion strategies will fix the actionability eval
